response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, extensive exposure to cloud infrastructure (AWS), and relevant work with agentic workflows and MCP — aligning with key requirements — but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years specifically in production-grade AI systems, vector databases, or RAG architectures, and his AI experience is mentioned as a recent contribution rather than a core career focus.
strengths: Demonstrated experience with agentic workflows and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven track record in cloud-native development (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Strong technical leadership and mentorship through workshops, open-source projects, and cross-team collaboration
concerns: No explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions; AI work appears recent and secondary
Missing clear experience with vector databases or retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) architectures
Limited documentation of AI-specific evaluation pipelines, observability frameworks, or LLM optimization techniques
